Our Story

Our Goodness Promise

At Mamaearth, we live to spread a little love and goodness every day. We believe that goodness isn’t a superpower, nor a special gift, it’s inside all of us and it shows in the little choices we make. Our mission is to bring you the best of nature through our purest and most nurturing products that are made without any toxins or harmful chemicals. For us goodness also means being good to the earth. Which is why we recycle more plastic than we use and we're PETA Certified - which means we never test on animals. This is our #GoodnessInside.

SHOP NOW

OUR PLEDGES

We Plant Goodness

1093966

Trees have got life already...
Everytime you buy from us, we plant more trees!

Super Safe Standards

Dermatologically Tested

We ensure each product is tested clinically on the sensitive human skin to ensure that it is not allergic.

FDA Approved

MamaEarth is FDA approved, which means we are 100% safe to be used for babies as well as mamas.

Made Safe Certified

The MADE SAFE (Made with Safe Ingredients™) seal means that a product is literally made with safe ingredients.
What Our Customers Say
I wanted to use natural products for my baby and came across Mamaearth. I use its Baby Shampoo, Body Wash for Babies and Baby Hair Oil, and and they all work very effectively. So if you are looking for a brand with an app, a safe and secure payment gateway, and a wide range of toxin-free products, Mamaearth is the one for you!
Gina
5.0
★
I live near the coastal region, and sun tan is a big issue here. A few months ago, I switched to Mamaearth Ubtan Face Wash, which has worked very well. I now have a natural glow on my face and my sun tan seems resolved too. Mamaearth’s skincare products are made of natural ingredients and contain no harmful preservatives. Being affordable is another positive too.
Waris Raza
5.0
★
I have always used only natural products for my baby. One day, I came across Mamaearth's products during an online search. I bought its Baby Shampoo, Toothpaste, and Face Cream; they all were toxin-free and effective. The shopping experience and payment system were safe, fast, and quick.
Manisha
5.0
★
I was facing excessive hair fall. I thus tried Mamaearth's Onion Shampoo, Onion Hair Mask, Onion Hair Serum, and Hair Oil Booster. These toxin-free hair care products are effective at minimizing these issues. I also use Ubtan Face Wash to keep sun tan away.
Tanmay
5.0
★
Being made of natural and toxin-free ingredients, Mamaearth's skincare and hair care products are very effective. They make my skin and hair healthy. I use Ubtan Face Wash, which is great for sun tan removal and treating hyper-pigmentation. If you are looking for any issues related to your skincare or hair care plans, you should opt for these products.
Priyanshi Singh
5.0
★
I use Mamaearth's Onion Hair Fall Kit. It comprises Onion Shampoo, Onion Conditioner, and Onion Hair Oil that help reduce excessive hair fall and boost growth. I've had one of the best shopping experiences. Recently I also bought a body lotion and Onion Hair Oil from there. As for my shopping experience, it was safe and quick. The delivery was early and easy to track. The payment gateway is also secure.

Mamaearth offers the best-in-class skincare products to help you discover the essence of beauty with the Goodness of Nature. We are also Asia’s first brand to be accoladed with Made Safe Certification for our beauty products.Mamaearth Sale B1G1 is live on top-selling skin & haircare. About Mamaearth Skincare Range

Deciphering a skincare routine is overwhelming at times. With so many options available, it becomes tough to understand what your skin truly needs. Our sedentary lifestyle has impacted skin's health, leaving it dull, and damaged. With the Goodness of Nature, it is possible to help protect the skin, boost radiance, prevent blemishes, and reverse the damage. You can check mama earth products list as our mama earth organics top-of-the-line products, such as sunscreen, and dark circles removal cream come enriched with natural ingredients and good Mama earth products price list to help get radiant skin complexion. 

Here's what you can expect in our skincare range:

  1. Face wash - The first step to cultivating a great skincare regimen is to pick up a face cleanser that fits your skin type. We bring you a wide range of options comprising Vitamin C Foaming Face Wash, Charcoal Face Wash, Retinol Face Wash, Multani Mitti Face Wash, and Micellar Water Foaming Makeup Remover. 
  2. Face Scrub - Face scrub are a luxurious addition to the beauty arsenal. Pick from our range of Face scrubs, including CoCo Face Scrub, Vitamin C Face Scrub, and Ubtan Face Scrub, for that refreshing look after a long tiring day. 
  3. Face Mask - A facial mask can be a great tool to have in your beauty arsenal. Our diverse face mask range includes- Mamaearth Ubtan Face Mask, Vitamin C Sleeping Mask,  charcoal face mask, C3 Face Mask, and Neem Face Mask for different skin woes. 
  4. Face Toner - An effective AM-PM routine begins with Cleansing-Toning-Moisturizing. For that refreshed look on your face, you may try our Ubtan Cleansing Milk with Turmeric and Saffron for Gentle Cleansing, or Vitamin C Face Toner and Rose Face Toner to minimize enlarged pores.
  5. Face Cream - We have a wide range of face cream for anti-aging, whitening cream and hyperpigmentation, tan removal cream. We also have the best day and night cream- Mamaearth dark spot removal cream, Retinol Cream, Aqua Glow Face Moisturizer, pimple cream, etc.
  6. Face Gel - Along with adding a stroke of hydration to your face, face gel can make your face skin look energized, bright, and clean. Our Aloe Vera Gel is a host of benefits for different skin woes. Packed with ingredients like Hyaluronic Acid, Aloe Vera, Vitamin E, and Glycerin, our face gels soothe your skin, seal in moisture, and improve the texture of your skin. 
  7. Face serum - It’s time to amp your skincare regimen with the Mamaearth face serum range. Our best-selling Retinol Serum, Skin Illuminate Face Serum, vitamin c serum gives you a radiant glow. Besides, Aqua Glow Face Serum range gives your skin a 72-hour long boost of hydration and niacinamide serum helps reduces acne marks. 
  8. Lip Balm - Our tinted lip balm keep your lips super moisturized for 12 hours. Pick from a wide range of options- Vitamin C and Honey, Turmeric and Saffron, Rose Oil and Castor Oil, Cherry and Coconut Oil, and CoCo. Its easy application formula gives you naturally soft lips in just one glide. You can also try the Mamaearth Nude Lipstick.
  9. Eye Kajal - Let everyone notice your beautiful eyes with our Charcoal Black Long Stay Kajal. Its waterproof and smudge-free formula gives your eyes a glossy sheen for 11 hours straight. It is also India’s first Made Safe certified Kajal that contains no toxins or harmful chemicals.

About Mamaearth Hair Care Range

Using the right hair products can make a big difference in your hair care regimen. Pollution, stress, and inadequate nutrition can leave your hair looking dull and lifeless. The best solution is to use safe and gentle hair care products that nourish your scalp and treat dull and frizzy hair. Our mamaarth products are thoughtfully formulated with potent ingredients to address common hair care issues. 

  1. Hair Oil - Our hair oils are made with time-tested ingredients like Bhringraj, Amla, almond oil for hair,  Coconut, Rice Bran, Castor Oil to prevent hair fall, gray hair, and dry and flaky skin. You can also check out the hair fall control and BhringAmla range, which contains 15 rare Ayurvedic herbs to nourish your scalp and strengthen your hair. 
  2. Hair Shampoo - Mamaearth shampoos are made with nutrient-rich ingredients like Argan Oil, Milk Protein, Tea-tree, Red Onion Seed, and Avocado Oil. Our Mamaearth Tea Tree Shampoo treats dry and itchy scalp, anti dandruff shampoo helps clear dandruff, while our Rice Water Shampoo Keratin is best for damaged hair. And rice water for hair makes hair silky smooth Also, check out our best dandruff shampoo range for dandruff treatment. 
  3. Hair Conditioner - A hair conditioner is a must if you want a long, shiny, and lustrous mane without having to visit a salon. We have many conditioners that repair your strands and add vitality. You can shop from an exclusive range of conditioners- Onion, Almond, BhringAmla, Apple Cider Vinegar, and so on.
  4. Hair Mask - Our hair mask are packed with rich ingredients to strengthen your hair and enhance its texture. Some of the options you can choose from our Argan Hair Mask, Tea Tree Anti-Dandruff Hair Mask, Onion Hair Mask, and Almond Hair Mask. 

You can also try our rich hair serum range and lipstick shades. Our Hair Serum is 100% natural and non-toxic, making them your go-to option for frizzy and unmanageable hair.

About Mamaearth Body Care Range

When it comes to beauty, your body also needs a little Treatment-Love-Care. Just as you need a face cleanser, exfoliator, and moisturizer for your face, you should also use body care products for the skin below your neck. 

  1. Body Wash - A hydrating body wash is a must to help restore skin moisture. Our Ubtan Body Wash offers the goodness of time-tested ingredients like Turmeric, Saffron, and Walnut Beads. The blend of natural ingredients gently exfoliates your skin and leaves it feeling soft and supple. You can also try Vitamin C Body Wash, Charcoal Body Wash, charcoal soap, and CoCo Nourishing Bathing Soaps. 
  2. Body Butter - Our body butter deeply nourishes your skin and creates a protective layer. Our body butter creams also help fight dryness, dullness, and skin darkening. Our best-selling products include CoCo Body Butter for Dry Skin and Ubtan Body Butter for Deep Nourishment.
  3. Body Lotion - Say goodbye to dull and dry skin this winter. Our best-selling Vitamin C Body Lotion is ideal for all skin types, stretch mark removal cream helps remove stretch marks, while the other ranges- Ubtan Body Lotion CoCo Body Lotions also help lock in moisture to keep your skin hydrated. 
  4. Hand Cream - Battling dry and rough skin on your hands? Try hand cream – it is enriched with ingredients like Shea Butter, Honey, Turmeric, Aloe Vera, Coconut Oil, Apricot Oil, and Vitamin C. Not only do our creams help nourish your skin, but this formula also kills 99% of germs and effortlessly helps sanitize your hands. 
  5. Body Scrub - Our nature-inspired body scrub gently polish your skin, irresistibly giving you smooth and supple skin. Our Ubtan Body Scrub is made with time-tested ingredients like Turmeric, Saffron, and Walnut Beads to give your skin a soft and supple texture. Also, our Neem Body Scrub made with Neem and Tulsi deeply exfoliates your skin.  
  6. Mamaearth's Deo helps you stay closer to yourself because it creates a fragrance as unique as you are. We welcome you to try out our exclusive range of perfume today

About Mamaearth Baby Care Range

When it comes to your little munchkin, you would not want to settle on anything but the best. So, we are committed to crafting 100% safe and natural products that are gentle on your baby’s skin. 

  1. Baby Bath Products - Our baby bath care range includes baby washes, baby shampoo, and bathing bars to make bath time a fun time for your little munchkin. Mamaearth baby products are tear-free formulas made with nourishing ingredients that deeply hydrate and help balance the baby’s skin and pH levels. Also, check out our bath soap and dusting powder which is best for dry & irritated skin. 
  2. Baby Skincare Products - We have a wide range of the best baby care products available on the Mamaearth website - baby lotions, creams, massage oil, and powders. Free from any toxins and harmful chemicals, our Made Safe Certified baby care range and mosquito repellent is dermatologically tested for your baby’s sensitive skin.  
  3. Baby Diaper - Our plant-based diapers are gentle on your baby’s skin and safe for the environment too. You can also get started with our Organic wet wipes - Bamboo Based Baby Wipes and Milky Soft Diaper Rash Cream. Our diapers are made from corn starch and free from latex, fragrance, and chlorine that let your baby stay healthy and happy all day long. 
  4. Oral Care - Now you can protect your little one’s teeth naturally. All oral care products, including toothpaste and baby lip balms, are thoughtfully formulated with high-quality ingredients. You can check out the Mamaearth all products with price on the website and below listed table too.

Our Bestsellers 

Onion hair oil - Our Onion Hair Oil is a new formula for stronger and healthier hair. Its lightweight and non-sticky formula help reduce hair fall and accelerate new hair cells. In addition, the nourishing ingredient Redensyl unblocks hair follicles and promotes hair regrowth. It’s time to welcome stronger and healthier hair.

Onion Shampoo - This nourishing onion shampoo promotes hair growth and deeply cleanses the hair by providing 22% more foam without toxins or harmful chemicals. With up to eight times more detangling action and four times more conditioning effect, this hair cleanser is a must-have in your hair care regimen. 

Ubtan Face Wash - Mamaearth Ubtan Face Wash is yet another of your best sellers known to rejuvenate tanned skin and undo the signs of aging. Formulated with ingredients like turmeric and saffron, it gives you glowing skin. Antioxidants in turmeric also prevent free radical damage, carrot seeds brighten skin tone, and walnut beads exfoliate dead skin cells.

Tea Tree Face Wash - With the natural blend of Neem and Tea Tree oil, this tea tree face wash helps prevent acne and pimples by deep cleansing, which removes impurities, unclogs pores, fights bacteria, and controls the production of excess oil. In addition, Aloe Vera soothes any redness or irritation in this salicylic acid face wash. 

Vitamin C Face Wash - Want to get rid of excess oil, dirt, and grime on your face? Our Vitamin C Face Wash, made with the goodness of Vitamin C, Turmeric, and Aloe Vera, will provide a natural glow to your skin. It helps repair the facial skin by boosting collagen production and blood circulation.

Charcoal Face Wash - Bring out the healthy and glowing skin in you with the goodness of Charcoal Face Wash. Enriched with Activated Charcoal, Clay, Tea Tree Oil, and Coffee, it draws out dirt, impurities, microparticles, makeup, sweat, excess oil and leaves the skin clean, fresh, and happy. 

Hyperpigmentation cream - A special formulation of Mulberry extract, Vitamin C, and Daisy Flower Extract prevents melanin synthesis and gives you soft and clear skin. This pigmentation cream gently reduces dark patches and gives you an even skin tone. It has a nongreasy formula that is quickly absorbed by your skin.

Vitamin C Under Eye Cream - Bid goodbye to under-eye dullness, dark circles, and hyperpigmentation with our Under Eye Cream enriched with Vitamin C, Hyaluronic Acid, Niacinamide, and Gotu Kola. This eye cream contains under-eye massages that depuff the eye and increase blood circulation. 

Rosemary Oil - Take control of your hair care plans! Try Mamaearth’s Rosemary Hair Growth Oil, it features Rosemary and Methi Dana that promote hairgrowth and stimulate hair growth. This toxin-free hair oil also helps control excessivehair fall and strengthens hair roots.

Multani Mitti Face Wash - Sensitive skin? Facing acne and pimples? Sign upfor the best skincare experience with our all-new Multani Mitti Face Wash. It featuresMultani Mitti and Bulgarian Rose that control excess oil to reduce acne andpromote hydration. Sitemap
